algorithm.coverage: sum(w_i for present i) / sum(w_i for all i); below min_weight_coverage -> INSUFFICIENT
algorithm.data_confidence: sum(w_i * conf_i for present i) / sum(w_i for present i)
algorithm.label_rule: first threshold [t, name] with score >= t, top-down; else AVOID
algorithm.lean: sum(w_i * conf_i * score_i) / sum(w_i * conf_i) — confidence-weighted; zero-confidence evidence has zero pull
algorithm.score: lean - risk_drawdown_penalty[risk] * drawdown_risk - (preserve_hysa_bar_per_pct * hysa_yield_pct if goal==preserve and yield known else 0)
